title: Design sustainable landscapes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design sustainable landscapes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess requirements for sustainable land use

pcs.text: Consult with client to discuss purpose and requirements of design and create brief establishing specific sustainability requirements for design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with client to discuss purpose and requirements of design and create brief establishing specific sustainability requirements for design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with client to discuss purpose and requirements of design and create brief establishing specific sustainability requirements for design.

pcs.text: Research and identify legislative and regulatory requirements and document in improvement plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and identify legislative and regulatory requirements and document in improvement plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and identify legislative and regulatory requirements and document in improvement plan.

pcs.text: Identify specific requirements for sustainability from business plan or documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify specific requirements for sustainability from business plan or documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify specific requirements for sustainability from business plan or documentation.

pcs.text: Assess land area for biophysical factors, biodiversity, historical, heritage and cultural attributes, services, site modifications and threats to sustainability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess land area for biophysical factors, biodiversity, historical, heritage and cultural attributes, services, site modifications and threats to sustainability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess land area for biophysical factors, biodiversity, historical, heritage and cultural attributes, services, site modifications and threats to sustainability.

pcs.text: Identify environmental implications of range of landscape works and research, identify and report to relevant personnel with recommendations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental implications of range of landscape works and research, identify and report to relevant personnel with recommendations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental implications of range of landscape works and research, identify and report to relevant personnel with recommendations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess requirements for sustainable land use

elements.title: Prepare an integrated design to improve land use

pcs.text: Develop concept plan for improvement that reflects client preferences and requirements, heritage issues, site factors and any identified environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop concept plan for improvement that reflects client preferences and requirements, heritage issues, site factors and any identified environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop concept plan for improvement that reflects client preferences and requirements, heritage issues, site factors and any identified environmental requirements.

pcs.text: Present concept plan to client or landowner for discussion and approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present concept plan to client or landowner for discussion and approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present concept plan to client or landowner for discussion and approval.

pcs.text: Research, report and reference specific technical documents or reports regarding energy efficiency and use, current and developing technologies and legislative and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research, report and reference specific technical documents or reports regarding energy efficiency and use, current and developing technologies and legislative and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research, report and reference specific technical documents or reports regarding energy efficiency and use, current and developing technologies and legislative and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Consider design of products, materials and finishes that are efficient, low risk and cyclic and confirm availability from local source
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider design of products, materials and finishes that are efficient, low risk and cyclic and confirm availability from local source?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider design of products, materials and finishes that are efficient, low risk and cyclic and confirm availability from local source.

pcs.text: Evaluate impact of resources, materials, equipment and machinery required for works on sustainable use of site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate impact of resources, materials, equipment and machinery required for works on sustainable use of site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate impact of resources, materials, equipment and machinery required for works on sustainable use of site.

pcs.text: Select plants and soils or soil ameliorant techniques for their integrated roles for designed outcomes in specific site conditions, system of irrigation and environmental parameters
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select plants and soils or soil ameliorant techniques for their integrated roles for designed outcomes in specific site conditions, system of irrigation and environmental parameters?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select plants and soils or soil ameliorant techniques for their integrated roles for designed outcomes in specific site conditions, system of irrigation and environmental parameters.

pcs.text: Review environmental conditions for functional analysis of site and planned design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review environmental conditions for functional analysis of site and planned design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review environmental conditions for functional analysis of site and planned design.

pcs.text: Prepare detailed plan or design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare detailed plan or design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare detailed plan or design.

pcs.text: Present plan or design to client or landowner for acceptance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present plan or design to client or landowner for acceptance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present plan or design to client or landowner for acceptance.

elements.title: Plan the implementation into the design

pcs.text: Outline staged implementation and development including site access
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Outline staged implementation and development including site access?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Outline staged implementation and development including site access.

pcs.text: Incorporate timelines for development according to implementation plan and principles of sustainability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Incorporate timelines for development according to implementation plan and principles of sustainability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate timelines for development according to implementation plan and principles of sustainability.

pcs.text: Determine schedules for planting and post-planting care according to requirements of plant species, site conditions and planning requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine schedules for planting and post-planting care according to requirements of plant species, site conditions and planning requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine schedules for planting and post-planting care according to requirements of plant species, site conditions and planning requirements.

pcs.text: Integrate protection of water resources, riparian zones or storm water drainage systems (SUDS), specified trees and existing vegetation into design plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Integrate protection of water resources, riparian zones or storm water drainage systems (SUDS), specified trees and existing vegetation into design plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Integrate protection of water resources, riparian zones or storm water drainage systems (SUDS), specified trees and existing vegetation into design plan.

pcs.text: Review chemical, non-chemical, ameliorant application and waste disposal procedures and processes to select designs of minimal environmental consequence and potential contamination of soils and ground water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review chemical, non-chemical, ameliorant application and waste disposal procedures and processes to select designs of minimal environmental consequence and potential contamination of soils and ground water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review chemical, non-chemical, ameliorant application and waste disposal procedures and processes to select designs of minimal environmental consequence and potential contamination of soils and ground water.

pcs.text: Review implementation outline for integration of approach to land and water management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review implementation outline for integration of approach to land and water management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review implementation outline for integration of approach to land and water management.

elements.title: Audit the implementation of sustainable practices

pcs.text: Monitor use of work materials, waste and debris from site works for low risk energy sustainable methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor use of work materials, waste and debris from site works for low risk energy sustainable methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor use of work materials, waste and debris from site works for low risk energy sustainable methods.

pcs.text: Sample and test soil and ground water quality where applicable to site and implement recommendations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sample and test soil and ground water quality where applicable to site and implement recommendations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sample and test soil and ground water quality where applicable to site and implement recommendations.

pcs.text: Confirm soil conservation measures and erosion sediment controls during construction and project life according to Environmental Protection Authority (EPA) legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm soil conservation measures and erosion sediment controls during construction and project life according to Environmental Protection Authority (EPA) legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm soil conservation measures and erosion sediment controls during construction and project life according to Environmental Protection Authority (EPA) legislation.

pcs.text: Verify protection measures for specified trees, protected flora and fauna and areas and objects of cultural significance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify protection measures for specified trees, protected flora and fauna and areas and objects of cultural significance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify protection measures for specified trees, protected flora and fauna and areas and objects of cultural significance.

pcs.text: Maintain or improve biodiversity, heritage, cultural and historical attributes, soil and water quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain or improve biodiversity, heritage, cultural and historical attributes, soil and water quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain or improve biodiversity, heritage, cultural and historical attributes, soil and water quality.

pcs.text: Present report to client according to design brief and contractual requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present report to client according to design brief and contractual requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present report to client according to design brief and contractual requirements.
